post.text: MCP test draft — safe to delete

deleteDraft.error: Too Many Requests (429 rate limited before delete could execute)

errors.message: Value "automatic_publishing" does not exist in "SchedulingType" enum.
Fragment cannot be spread here as objects of type "PostActionPayload" can never be of type "VoidMutationError".
Fragment cannot be spread here as objects of type "DeletePostPayload" can never be of type "NotFoundError".

createPost.message: Invalid post: Instagram posts require at least one image or video., Instagram posts require a type (post, story, or reel).

errors.message: Too many requests from this client. Please try again later.

notes: SchedulingType enum uses 'automatic'/'notification', NOT 'automatic_publishing'/'notification_publishing' — docs reference page was WRONG
PostActionPayload union does NOT include VoidMutationError — only PostActionSuccess | MutationError
DeletePostPayload union does NOT include NotFoundError — only DeletePostSuccess (and possibly MutationError)
MutationError response for createPost has shape: { message: string } — returned when validation fails (e.g., Instagram requires media)
Draft posts have status 'draft', via 'buffer', dueAt null
allowedActions on draft includes: addPostToQueue, publishPostNow, updatePost, publishPostNext, updatePostSchedule, updatePostTags, addPostNote, duplicatePost, deletePost, updateShopGridLink
Rate limit error shape: { errors: [{ message, extensions: { code: 'RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED', window: '15m' } }] }
Rate limit returns HTTP 429 (not 200 with errors like other GraphQL errors)
GraphQL validation errors return HTTP 400 with extensions.code = 'GRAPHQL_VALIDATION_FAILED'
LinkedIn channel accepts text-only posts; Instagram requires at least one image or video plus a type (post/story/reel)
3 draft posts were created during testing that may not have been deleted due to rate limiting
